name: Applesauce Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening and brown sugar together until creamy.
2. Blend in the egg and sweetened canned applesauce. If the mixture separates, it will blend evenly when the dry ingredients are added.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and allspice.
4. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the creamed mixture and blend well.
5. Stir in the oats and raisins.
6. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (375°F) for 12 to 15 minutes.
